title: Dhammapada, Chapter 17: Anger
description: Chapter 17 of the Dhammapada — the Buddha's collected verses on wisdom and the path.
introduction: Chapter 17 of the Dhammapada — the Buddha's collected verses on wisdom and the path.

text: Overcome anger by non-anger. Overcome evil by good. Overcome the miser by giving. Overcome the liar by truth.
